# Worf - Frappe Solutions Company

Worf is a Frappe and ERPNext solutions company based in India. We offer comprehensive Frappe app development, ERPNext implementation, cloud hosting, DevOps services, security, and migrations. We have completed 100+ successful implementations across manufacturing, healthcare, pharma, and services industries.

## Services
- Frappe App Development: Custom application development using the Frappe framework
- ERPNext Implementation: End-to-end ERPNext setup, configuration, and deployment
- Cloud Hosting: Managed cloud hosting for Frappe and ERPNext applications
- DevOps Services: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, and deployment strategies
- Security & Compliance: Security audits, penetration testing, and compliance implementation
- Data Migration: Seamless migration from legacy systems to Frappe/ERPNext
- Integrations: Third-party integrations with payment gateways, CRMs, and business tools

## Key Pages
- / - Homepage: Overview of Worf's Frappe and ERPNext services
- /about - Company overview, team, and mission
- /apps - Browse Frappe applications in our marketplace
- /store - App store for Frappe applications
- /contact - Get in touch for consultations and quotes
- /developer - Developer portal for app developers
- /community - Join the Frappe community discussions

## Contact Information
- Email: ping@worf.cloud
- Phone: +91 98994 94479
- Website: https://worf.cloud

## Target Audience
- Small to medium businesses looking for ERP solutions
- Enterprises seeking Frappe and ERPNext implementation
- Developers building applications on the Frappe framework
- Companies requiring custom Frappe app development
- Organizations needing ERPNext hosting and DevOps support

## Industries Served
- Manufacturing
- Healthcare
- Pharmaceuticals
- Education
- E-commerce
- Services
- Retail
- Logistics

## Technology Stack
- Framework: Frappe (Python-based full-stack framework)
- ERP: ERPNext (open-source ERP built on Frappe)
- Hosting: Cloud infrastructure with DevOps automation
- Database: MariaDB/PostgreSQL
- Frontend: Vue.js, JavaScript
- Backend: Python, Frappe Framework
